the face value of the security.

controls.control_description:
If acquisition cost is more than the face value, the premium arising out of
difference between face value and acquisition cost shall be amortised over the
period remaining to maturity.

Earned: Item II - Income on Investments as a deduction and such amount
need not be disclosed separately.

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be reduced to the extent of the amount amortised during the relevant accounting period
controls.control_description:

the amount amortised during the relevant accounting period.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be marked to market at monthly or at more frequent intervals
controls.control_description:
The individual securities in the HFT category shall be marked to market at
monthly or at more frequent intervals.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be marked to market at quarterly or at more frequent intervals
controls.control_description:
The individual securities in the AFS category shall be marked to market at
quarterly or at more frequent intervals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be marked to market at quarterly or at more frequent intervals

controls.control_description:
The book value of individual securities in HFT and AFS shall not undergo any
change after marking to market.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undergo any change after marking to market

controls.control_description:
Securities under AFS and HFT categories shall be separately valued security-

to in paragraph 28 (viz., Government Securities, other approved securities,
Shares, Debentures & Bonds, Subsidiaries and / or joint ventures and others (to
be specified)).

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ignored

Net appreciation, if
any, shall be ignored.

controls.control_description:
Net depreciation required to be provided for in any one classification shall not be
reduced on account of net appreciation in any other classification.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reduced on account of net appreciation in any other classification

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as provided in this chapter

The 'market value' for the purpose of periodical valuation of investments included
in the AFS and the HFT categories shall be as provided in this Chapter.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the prices declared by the financial benchmarks india pvt
controls.control_description:
The 'market value' for the quoted securities shall be the prices declared by the
Financial Benchmarks India Pvt.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the prices declared by the financial benchmarks india pvt

controls.control_description:
For securities whose prices are not published by FBIL, market price of
the quoted security shall be as available from the trades / quotes on the
exchanges / reporting platforms / trading platforms authorised by RBI / SEBI and
prices declared by Fixed Income Money Market and Derivatives Association of
India (FIMMDA).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as available from the trades / quotes on the exchanges / reporting platforms / trading platforms authorised by rbi / sebi and prices declared by fi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at carrying cost
controls.control_description: Treasury Bills shall be valued at carrying cost.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at carrying cost

controls.control_description:
Unquoted Central / State Government Securities shall be valued on the basis of
the prices / YTM rates published by the FBIL.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued on the basis of the prices / ytm rates published by the fbil

Other Approved Securities shall be valued applying the YTM method by marking
them up by 25 basis points above the yields of the Central Government Securities
of equivalent maturity put out by FBIL.

appropriate mark-up over the YTM rates for Central Government Securities
as put out by FBIL / FIMMDA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued by applying the appropriate mark-up over the ytm rates for central government securities as put out by fbil / fimmda

controls.control_description:
Special Securities issued by the Government of India

Bank of India (during the 2008 rights issue), Industrial Finance Corporation of
India Ltd., and Food Corporation of India), which are directly issued by the
Government of India and which do not carry SLR status, shall be valued at a
spread of 25 bps above the corresponding yield on Central Government
Securities of equivalent maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at a spread of 25 bps above the corresponding yield on central government securities of equivalent maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be higher than the price at which the share was traded
controls.control_description:
Preference Shares
(1) When a preference share has been traded on an exchange within 15 days
prior to the valuation date, the value shall not be higher than the price at
which the share was traded.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be higher than the price at which the share was traded

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on ytm basis with appropriate mark-up over the ytm rates for central government securities of equivalent maturity put out by the fbil subject to su
controls.control_description:

appropriate mark-up over the YTM rates for Central Government Securities
of equivalent maturity put out by the FBIL subject to such preference share
not being valued above its redemption value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on ytm basis with appropriate mark-up over the ytm rates for central government securities of equivalent maturity put out by the fbil subject to su

controls.control_description:
The mark-up shall be graded
according to the ratings assigned to the preference shares by the credit
rating agencies and the mark-up cannot be negative, i.e., the YTM rate shall
not be lower than the coupon rate / YTM for a Central Government Security
of equivalent maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be graded according to the ratings assigned to the preference shares by the credit rating agencies and the mark-up cannot be negative, i

taken for accrued dividends / coupons and the value determined as above

one year, 25 per cent if arrears are for two years, so on and so forth (i.e.,
with 10 per cent increments).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken for accrued dividends / coupons and the value determined as above on ytm shall be discounted further by at least 15 per cent if arrears are f

The overarching principle should be that
<image>
valuation shall be based on conservative assessment of cash flows and
appropriate discount rates to reflect the risk.

Statutory Auditors shall also

associated with such instruments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also specifically examine as to whether the valuations adequately reflect the risk associated with such instruments

The depreciation / provision requirement

performing preference shares.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to be set-off against appreciation on other performing preference shares

controls.control_objective: To ensure be marked to market preferably on a daily basis, but at least on a weekly basis
controls.control_description:

preferably on a daily basis, but at least on a weekly basis.

controls.control_description:
The date as on which
the latest balance sheet is drawn up shall not precede the date of valuation
by more than 18 months.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to precede the date of valuation by more than 18 months

controls.control_description:
In case the latest audited balance sheet is not

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at ₹1 per company

funds account (for all gilt related transactions) with the same bank.

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make appropriate provisions for the depreciation in the value of the investment

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify its investment in central government securities and state government securities as npi
controls.control_description:
Investment in Government Securities and Government guaranteed securities
(1) An RRB shall not classify its investment in Central Government Securities
and State Government Securities as NPI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify its investment in central government securities and state government securities as npi

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify investments in central government guaranteed securities as npi unless the central government has repudiated the guarantee when invoked
controls.control_description:
(2) An RRB shall not classify investments in Central Government guaranteed
securities as NPI unless the Central Government has repudiated the
guarantee when invoked.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify investments in central government guaranteed securities as npi unless the central government has repudiated the guarantee when invoked

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to recognise mtm gains / losses
controls.control_description:
In respect of such securities held in AFS and
HFT, an RRB shall continue to recognise MTM gains / losses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to recognise mtm gains / losses

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised only on realisation basis
controls.control_description:
However,
any income shall be recognised only on realisation basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised only on realisation basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify its investments in state government guaranteed securities as npi and apply prudential norms for identification of npi and provisioning
controls.control_description:
(3) An RRB shall classify its investments in State Government guaranteed
securities as NPI and apply prudential norms for identification of NPI and
provisioning, if interest / instalment of principal (including maturity
proceeds) or any other amount due to the RRB remains unpaid for more
than 90 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify its investments in state government guaranteed securities as npi and apply prudential norms for identification of npi and provisioning

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior
to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish similar statements in respect of pms client's accounts and other constituents' accounts (including brokers)
controls.control_description:
Where client / constituent accounts are permitted, a bank shall furnish similar
statements in respect of PMS client's Accounts and other constituents'
Accounts (including Brokers).

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mentioned under column 2
controls.control_description:
In the case of PMS / other constituents' accounts,
the face value and book value of securities appearing in the relevant registers
of the bank shall be mentioned under Column 2.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mentioned under column 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided in the footnote
controls.control_description:
Details of securities held on physical form (SGL Forms, scrips, letter of
allotment, subscription receipt etc.), if any, may be provided in the footnote.
